text: I find myself in a space that seems to be dedicated to creativity and research, perhaps an innovation lab or exhibition area. The colors and lighting evoke a sense of vibrancy and curiosity. Viewing the "R+D" wall, I feel both inspired and contemplative. There is an undercurrent of anticipation—the promise of new ideas taking shape, and yet also a certain ambiguity, as if the path ahead is open and undefined. This environment encourages not only productivity, but the freedom to explore the unknown. I am at once comfortable and slightly on edge, aware that here, change and discovery are ever-present.
